signals.raw: Trump hints at potential progress:** On April 15, President Trump stated the "end to war in sight," suggested peace talks may restart in 1-2 days, and indicated the April 8 ceasefire (expiring soon) may not need extension—spurring market rallies and energy price stability[2].
